top_signals.title: Susquehanna Says It Lost Millions to Mystery Insider Traders
top_signals.summary: Susquehanna Investment Group is attempting to unmask the identities of individuals it claims made at least $100 million trading on inside information about a Chinese government crackdown on cross-border brokerages last month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SEC wins $5.4M judgment in NanoBit crypto fraud case
top_signals.summary: The SEC alleged that NanoBit’s crypto trading platform was fake and that hundreds of thousands of dollars in investor funds were misappropriated.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
